name: American Copper Development Corp.
description: American Copper Development Corp. is a copper exploration and development company advancing its 100%-owned Lordsburg Project in southwestern New Mexico, a 7,046-hectare property comprising 790 lode mining claims and 105 patented claims. The company's 2023 maiden drill program confirmed a large-scale porphyry copper system with high-grade intercepts including 144 ft of 1.00% copper equivalent. The company is at the exploration and development stage, focused on expanding the known porphyry copper system at Lordsburg.
